create_time.description: Timestamp when the AlloyDB instance was created

effective_annotations.description: Annotations applied to the instance for metadata purposes

effective_labels.description: Labels effectively applied to the instance for organization

id.description: Unique identifier for the AlloyDB instance

ip_address.description: Primary private IP address of the instance

name.description: Fully qualified name of the AlloyDB instance

outbound_public_ip_addresses.description: List of public IPs for outbound traffic from the instance

public_ip_address.description: Assigned public IP address for external access

reconciling.description: Indicates if the instance is in the process of updating

state.description: Current operational state of the instance

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in the Terraform configuration

uid.description: Globally unique identifier for the instance

update_time.description: Timestamp of the last update to the instance
